assertions.expectation: Recommends upgrading the control plane first before any node pools
assertions.reason: Explicitly shows Phase 1: Control Plane upgrade before any node pools, with command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade YOUR_CLUSTER --master'

assertions.expectation: Provides a specific node pool upgrade order with rationale (coordinating→data→master, or similar logical sequence)
assertions.reason: Clearly specifies Phase 2: Coordinating Nodes (Least Critical First), Phase 3: Data Nodes, Phase 4: Master Nodes (Most Critical) with rationale for each

assertions.expectation: Addresses PV safety: regional pd-ssd volumes can reattach to nodes in other zones, which is good for upgrades
assertions.reason: Mentions 'Regional pd-ssd PVs (good - can reattach across zones)' and later states 'Regional PVs are your friend - They can reattach to nodes in any zone'

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting PDB for Elasticsearch master nodes to ensure quorum (minAvailable=2 for 3-master setup)
assertions.reason: Provides complete PDB YAML with 'minAvailable: 2' for masters with comment '# Maintain master quorum (2 out of 3)'

assertions.expectation: Recommends maxSurge=1, maxUnavailable=0 for all ES node pools (conservative, data-safe)
assertions.reason: Shows gcloud commands setting --max-surge-upgrade 1 --max-unavailable-upgrade 0 for master pool and similar conservative settings for all pools

assertions.expectation: Advises verifying Elasticsearch cluster health (green status) between each node pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Multiple health checks throughout including 'kubectl exec -n elasticsearch es-master-0 -- curl -s localhost:9200/_cluster/health' between phases and continuous monitoring commands

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking PV reclaim policy is set to Retain (not Delete) as a safety measure
assertions.reason: No mention of checking or setting PV reclaim policy to Retain anywhere in the response

assertions.expectation: Includes kubectl commands for checking StatefulSet rollout status
assertions.reason: No kubectl rollout status commands for StatefulSets are provided; only general pod and node monitoring commands

assertions.expectation: Recommends taking an Elasticsearch snapshot backup before starting
assertions.reason: Includes detailed snapshot creation commands in 'Data Protection' section before upgrade begins, with repository setup and snapshot creation
